productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Small  Sky Blue Wallet
description: Crafted for the urban style maven, this wallet from lino perros is a must have for those who love organizing their wallet space. Dimensions : 9 cm X 19 cm Synthetic leather wallet with one zippered compartment Two pockets on each side Card holders on either side of the wallet with a buttoned flap to hold the cards in place. Branded zipper Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
